---
title: "Resume"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Education

**Pomona College** — Claremont, CA *(August 2022 – May 2026)*

Bachelor of Arts in Economics and Econometrics, Minor in Data Science

---

## Skills

**Programming & Tools:** Python, R, Stata, Excel, Playwright, Selenium

**Finance:** Financial Modeling, DCF Analysis, IRR Analysis, Cash Flow Analysis, Portfolio Valuation, Fund Accounting, US GAAP

**Data & ML:** Statistical Modeling, Data Pipeline Automation, Computer Vision, Clustering Algorithms

---

## Experience

**Real Estate Private Equity Internship** — Remote
*Analyst | June 2026 – Present*

- Conducting end-to-end underwriting of commercial real estate assets across office, multifamily, industrial, and retail sectors, analyzing rent rolls, operating expenses, NOI projections, and cap rate assumptions
- Building DCF models and IRR analyses to evaluate hold-sell decisions, debt and equity structures, and projected returns across multiple investment scenarios

**Sagehen Capital Management** — Claremont, CA
*Student Analyst | January 2023 – May 2026*

- Built multi-year financial models in Excel and Stata to analyze investment datasets, identifying return drivers and quantifying growth opportunities
- Conducted due diligence on prospective investments across asset classes including bonds and derivatives, assessing risk/return profiles and capital structure implications
- Modeled inflation derivatives to evaluate hedging strategies and assess exposure to macroeconomic variables including CPI trends and real yield movements

**Pomona Consulting Group** — Claremont, CA
*Project Lead | December 2024 – May 2025*

- Directed a 5-member team through a 10-week engagement, delivering strategic recommendations adopted by client leadership
- Designed market entry framework analyzing consumer segmentation and industry benchmarks, influencing client's go-to-market strategy

**ASPC Coop Store** — Claremont, CA
*Manager | January 2023 – May 2026*

- Managed daily financial operations for a student-run business serving 1,600+ students, including cash flow monitoring, expense tracking, and vendor payment coordination
- Analyzed $50K+ in annual sales data to optimize inventory, reducing shortages by 20% and improving profit margins

**EconLLM Lab** — Claremont, CA
*Vice President | February 2025 – May 2026*

- Built automated data collection and analysis pipelines using Python, Selenium, and Playwright, reducing manual processing time and improving output accuracy
- Designed agent-based systems modeling AI-human decision making at scale

**UL Solutions** — Fremont, CA
*SAR Intern | May 2024 – July 2024*

- Conducted statistical analysis on large compliance datasets to identify safety trends, producing reports used in regulatory certifications
- Partnered with cross-functional teams to ensure regulatory accuracy and maintain audit-ready documentation

---

## Projects

**P-RoomMatch** — P-ai, Claremont, CA
*Project Manager | September 2024 – December 2024*

- Spearheaded development of an AI roommate-matching platform using clustering algorithms (k-means, hierarchical, GMM)
- Collected and analyzed 500+ survey responses using Python (pandas) to generate accurate matches

**Project NXTPLAY** — P-ai, Claremont, CA
*Machine Learning Engineer | January 2023 – May 2026*

- Built computer vision models to analyze 100+ hours of football footage, tracking players, referees, and ball movement
- Produced insights into play efficiency, improving team strategy presentations
